title: Premium Advancements | Custom Achievements
description: Create unlimited custom advancements/achievements using a clean GUI, vault, MySQL support 1.21+
body:
**Premium Advancements** Create unlimited custom advancements with an in-game GUI editor. No config files needed.

[![Minecraft](https://img.shields.io/badge/Minecraft-1.21+-brightgreen)](https://papermc.io)
[![Java](https://img.shields.io/badge/Java-21-orange)](https://adoptium.net)

---

## Why Premium Advancements?

The easiest way to add achievements, quests, and progression to your Minecraft server. **43 triggers**, real-time tracking, 7 reward types, and a full GUI editor - all without editing a single configuration file.

---

## Features

- **In-Game GUI Editor** - 5 screens: main list, create wizard, edit, confirm delete, stats viewer
- **43 Trigger Types** - JOIN, BREAK_BLOCK, PLACE_BLOCK, KILL, OBTAIN_ITEM, CRAFT_ITEM, SMELT_ITEM, ANVIL_USE, GRINDSTONE_USE, ENCHANT_ITEM, ENCHANT, ENTER_DIMENSION, TRAVEL_DISTANCE, FISH, BREED, TAME, CONSUME, EAT, HARVEST, TRADE, POTION_EFFECT, DEATH, DAMAGE_DEALT, DAMAGE_TAKEN, JUMP, DROP_ITEM, SHEAR, MILK, COMPOSTER_USE, ARMOR_EQUIP, FILL_BUCKET, EMPTY_BUCKET, SNIFF, RIPTIDE, RAID_WIN, TARGET_BLOCK, BELL_RING, CROSSBOW_SHOT, FIREWORK, GLIDE, SWIM, CLIMB, SLEEP, CHOP_TREE
- **Progression Tracking** - Counter-based progress saved across sessions; cumulative distance (glide/swim/climb/travel)
- **7 Reward Types** - Console commands, Vault money, items (with enchants/name/lore/CMD), LuckPerms permissions, PlayerPoints, weighted random reward pools, global broadcast
- **Notifications** - Toast popups, chat announcements, action bar progress
- **Dependencies** - Chain advancements with prerequisites for progression systems
- **Filters** - Block/item/entity type filters, world restrictions, permission gates, Custom Model Data (ItemsAdder/Oraxen), enchantment type/level, potion effect/amplifier, death cause, villager profession, bed color, sheep color, dimension, travel mode
- **Hidden Advancements** - Invisible until all prerequisites are met
- **Visual Tree** - Customizable x/y positions and connection targets for a clean advancement display
- **Database** - SQLite (file-based, easy) or MySQL/MariaDB with HikariCP connection pool
- **Multi-Language** - Built-in English and French; custom language file support
- **PlaceholderAPI** - 8 placeholders for scores, progress, ranking
- **bStats** - Anonymous usage statistics (toggleable)

---

## Quick Start

1. Install [UltimateAdvancementAPI](https://www.spigotmc.org/resources/95585/) v2.7.1+
2. Drop the plugin in `plugins/` and restart
3. Run `/padv gui` to create advancements
4. Press **L** in-game to view them

---

## Commands

| Command | Description |
|---------|-------------|
| `/padv help` | Show help menu |
| `/padv gui` | Open advancement management GUI |
| `/padv info <id>` | Show full advancement details |
| `/padv give <player> <advancement>` | Grant an advancement to a player |
| `/padv take <player> <advancement\|all>` | Revoke an advancement (or all) from a player |
| `/padv list [player]` | List completed advancements |
| `/padv stats [player]` | Open stats GUI with progress bars |
| `/padv reload` | Reload configuration |
| `/padv placeholders` | List all placeholders |

### Permissions

| Permission | Default | Description |
|------------|---------|-------------|
| `premiumadvancements.admin` | OP | Full access to all admin commands |
| `premiumadvancements.give` | OP | Grant advancements |
| `premiumadvancements.take` | OP | Revoke advancements |
| `premiumadvancements.list` | **true** | List own advancements |
| `premiumadvancements.list.others` | OP | List others' advancements |
| `premiumadvancements.stats` | **true** | View own stats |
| `premiumadvancements.stats.others` | OP | View others' stats |

### Placeholders

| Placeholder | Description |
|-------------|-------------|
| `%premiumadvancements_completed%` | Total completed advancements |
| `%premiumadvancements_total%` | Total available advancements |
| `%premiumadvancements_progress_<id>%` | Progress (e.g., 45/100) |
| `%premiumadvancements_completed_<id>%` | Completed status (true/false) |
| `%premiumadvancements_percent%` | Overall completion % |
| `%premiumadvancements_percent_<id>%` | Per-advancement completion % |
| `%premiumadvancements_latest%` | Latest completed title |
| `%premiumadvancements_ranking%` | Player rank by completions |

---

## Requirements

- **Paper** 1.21.4+ (or fork)
- **Java** 21+
- **UltimateAdvancementAPI** 2.7.1+ (required)
- **Vault** (optional, for money rewards)
- **PlaceholderAPI** (optional, for placeholders)
- **LuckPerms** (optional, for permission rewards)
- **PlayerPoints** (optional, for points rewards)

---
